zone_summary: Notebook-specific error handling now emits structured notebook error codes, formatted detail messages, and specialized ProblemDetails titles for ETag and notebook-validation failures; generic notebook failures are wrapped with notebook/workspace context, and RunDag/Spark mapping now preserves explicit notebook error codes instead of collapsing everything to the generic notebook exception code.

behavioral_changes.summary: Magic-command parsing failures now surface as MLV_MAGIC_COMMAND_NOT_SUPPORTED with notebook ID, 1-based cell index, and line number filled into the user-facing detail.
Multiple MLV definitions in a single notebook cell now surface as MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL with the offending 1-based cell index and notebook ID in the detail.
Notebook API ETag mismatches are now normalized from upstream 412 to a 422 notebook error carrying the dedicated MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED code and detail template.
ProblemDetails responses now use the title "Notebook recently updated" when the notebook error code is MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED.
ProblemDetails responses now use the title "Notebook validation error" when the notebook error code is MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL.

Notebook exceptions without an explicit ErrorCode are now wrapped through the MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION template so controller responses include notebook/workspace context instead of raw exception text.
RunDag/Spark exception mapping now preserves explicit notebook ErrorCode values and already-formatted notebook messages instead of always returning MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION.

RunDag/Spark exception mapping now wraps generic notebook failures into a bracketed [MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION]: ... failureType: ... message using the notebook template detail without duplicating the code prefix.
NotebookException now carries a documented two-tier contract: downstream consumers must branch on ErrorCode.HasValue, not Message emptiness, to choose passthrough versus template wrapping.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: { ErrorCode.MLV_MAGIC_COMMAND_NOT_SUPPORTED, $"MLV_MAGIC_COMMAND_NOT_SUPPORTED: Magic commands (e.g., %pip, %run) in cell {{{Constants.CellIndexKey}}} at line {{{Constants.LineNumberKey}}} of Notebook '{{{Constants.NotebookIdKey}}}' are not supported in materialized lake view definitions. Remove or comment out magic commands and retry." },
grounding_evidence.reason: Defines the new user-facing detail template for notebook magic-command failures.
Populates the template from parse context and rethrows a NotebookException carrying the formatted magic-command message.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: { ErrorCode.MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL, $"MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL: More than one materialized lake view definition exists in cell {{{Constants.CellIndexKey}}} of Notebook '{{{Constants.NotebookIdKey}}}'. Ensure only one view per cell." },
grounding_evidence.reason: Defines the new detail contract for the single-cell multiple-definition notebook validation error.
Turns the multi-definition detection branch into a coded NotebookException with the new cell-index-aware detail.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
/// Error indicating notebook content changed after operation started (ETag mismatch).
MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED,
grounding_evidence.reason: Adds a dedicated notebook error code for ETag mismatch handling.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: { ErrorCode.MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED, $"MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED: Contents in the Notebook {{{Constants.NotebookDetailsKey}}} changed after the operation started. Refresh and try again." },
grounding_evidence.reason: Defines the new ETag-mismatch detail text surfaced to callers.
Reclassifies notebook API 412 responses into 422 UnprocessableEntity NotebookException instances with the dedicated ETag error code.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: public const string NotebookRecentlyUpdatedTitle = "Notebook recently updated";
grounding_evidence.reason: Introduces the concrete title string used for ETag notebook errors.
Maps the ETag notebook error code to the specialized ProblemDetails title.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: public const string NotebookValidationErrorTitle = "Notebook validation error";
grounding_evidence.reason: Introduces the concrete title string used for notebook validation failures.
Maps the multiple-definition notebook error code to the specialized validation ProblemDetails title.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: { ErrorCode.MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION, $"MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION: Failed to create lineage due to Notebook exception in notebook '{{{Constants.NotebookIdKey}}}' (workspace: '{{{Constants.WorkspaceIdKey}}}'). {{{Constants.ErrorMessageKey}}}Review Notebook logs and retry." },
grounding_evidence.reason: Defines the new generic notebook-exception template including notebook, workspace, and appended raw error detail.
Shows the controller’s generic-notebook branch now templating raw notebook failures before returning the HTTP error response.
RunDag/Spark mapping now preserves explicit notebook error codes and uses the preformatted notebook message as-is when ErrorCode is present.
Shows the generic-notebook RunDag branch wrapping technical notebook failures with the registry template, stripping the prefix, then producing the bracketed Spark error format.
Documents the newly added contract that ErrorCode presence, not Message emptiness, chooses passthrough versus template wrapping.
Shows that HTTP notebook responses now pass through a specialized title and the already-formatted detail when the exception carries a specific notebook ErrorCode.
Enables the specialized notebook title strings to flow into the returned ProblemDetails payload instead of always using the default title.

scenario_sketches.title: Magic-command notebook parse errors include notebook, cell, and line context in MLV_MAGIC_COMMAND_NOT_SUPPORTED
scenario_sketches.rationale: Exercise a notebook cell containing a magic command and assert the surfaced detail uses the new MLV_MAGIC_COMMAND_NOT_SUPPORTED template with resolved notebook ID, 1-based cell index, and line number.

scenario_sketches.title: Multiple materialized-view definitions in one cell surface MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL with 1-based cell index
scenario_sketches.rationale: Feed a single notebook cell containing more than one MLV definition and assert the thrown/returned detail names the notebook, the offending 1-based cell number, and the dedicated conflict code.

scenario_sketches.title: Notebook API 412 ETag mismatches are normalized to 422 MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED responses
scenario_sketches.rationale: Mock the notebook API returning PreconditionFailed and verify callers observe UnprocessableEntity with the new MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED detail rather than the old 412 passthrough wording.

scenario_sketches.title: ETag notebook errors use the ProblemDetails title 'Notebook recently updated'
scenario_sketches.rationale: Drive an MLV_NB_ETAG_CHANGED notebook exception through the controller and assert the ProblemDetails title is the specialized ETag title, not the default error title.

scenario_sketches.title: Single-cell definition conflicts use the ProblemDetails title 'Notebook validation error'
scenario_sketches.rationale: Drive an MLV_MULTIPLE_DEFINITION_CONFLICT_SINGLE_CELL notebook exception through the controller and assert the ProblemDetails title is the validation-specific title, not the default error title.

scenario_sketches.title: Generic notebook exceptions without ErrorCode are wrapped with notebook and workspace context in controller responses
scenario_sketches.rationale: Construct a NotebookException with status/workspace/notebook IDs but no ErrorCode and assert the controller response detail is generated from MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION with the raw message appended and the default title retained.

scenario_sketches.title: RunDag preserves explicit notebook error codes and passthrough messages when NotebookException.ErrorCode is set
scenario_sketches.rationale: Map a NotebookException that carries an explicit ErrorCode and a curated message, then assert MapExceptionToErrorInfo returns that specific code and a bracketed message using the original notebook message rather than rewrapping it as MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION.

scenario_sketches.title: RunDag wraps generic notebook failures into bracketed MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION messages with failureType
scenario_sketches.rationale: Map a NotebookException without ErrorCode and assert the resulting Spark/RunDag message is `[MLV_LINEAGE_CREATION_NOTEBOOK_EXCEPTION]: ... failureType: ...`, includes notebook/workspace context, and does not duplicate the code prefix in the detail body.

scenario_sketches.title: ErrorCode.HasValue, not non-empty Message, selects notebook passthrough versus template wrapping
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use two NotebookException instances that both have non-empty Message values—one with ErrorCode and one without—and assert downstream mapping/controller logic takes opposite branches based solely on ErrorCode.HasValue, per the new documented contract.
